summary: The diff demonstrates implementation of all three requirements: the visited button functionality in RestaurantCard.tsx (REQ-43), the restaurant detail page with ratings and notes (REQ-44), and the addition of three new restaurants to backend/main.mo (REQ-45). All requested features appear to be present with appropriate implementation details.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration module (backend/migration.mo) for data migration support
hallucinated_features.reason: The BuildRequest does not mention implementing a migration system or migration module. The diff shows a new file 'backend/migration.mo' with data migration types and a run function, which was not requested in any requirement.

hallucinated_features.description: Migration integration in backend/main.mo actor with 'with migration' clause
hallucinated_features.reason: The diff shows 'with migration = Migration.run' clause added to the actor definition in backend/main.mo. This migration functionality was not requested in the BuildRequest.
